description: REPO can only be modified or merged into by one agent at a time
TEST_ENV can only be used by one agent at a time
Design changes must be approved by ARCHITECT before implementation begins
All code changes must pass code review before being merged
After shared library modification in REPO, all dependent modules must be retested
ARCHITECT approves or rejects design proposals
REVIEWER approves code or requests changes before merge
Design approval -> implementation -> code review -> merge -> test (sequential pipeline)
Both DEVELOPER_A and DEVELOPER_B need REPO access to modify shared code
Both developers need REPO access to merge their changes sequentially
Hold-and-wait: developer holds REPO while waiting for ARCHITECT approval, blocking the other developer
